body: ac-04 satisfied on mac (macbook, 2026-05-13 11:39 AEST). brew upgrade meridian-online/tap/orbit 0.4.11 -> 0.4.12 landed via the v0.4.12 release-workflow run (25771994679). orbit --version prints orbit 0.4.12; orbit session prime returns substrate context (bound: 50 items). Four-target build matrix + homebrew-tap formula bump on tag push verified end-to-end.

ac-10 satisfied: pipeline produces working binaries on both mac and linux. Mac evidence (macbook, 11:39 AEST): brew upgrade meridian-online/tap/orbit 0.4.11 -> 0.4.12, orbit --version prints orbit 0.4.12, orbit session prime returns substrate context. Linux evidence (beelink/linuxbrew, 11:46 AEST): identical brew upgrade path, orbit --version 0.4.12, orbit session prime returns 1 open spec + 10 memories. Caveat for the audit trail: not literally fresh boxes (both had 0.4.11 from a prior install) — the upgrade path was tested instead of first-install. Pipeline correctness is demonstrated end-to-end; a true greenfield install requires uninstalling first. Note also that I closed this spec prematurely after ac-04 on the strength of a truncated AC read; ac-10 was still unchecked at close time. The substrate accepted the close because spec.close only enforces task-completion, not AC-completion. ac-10 ticked in place post-close.
